{{Quote|They killed most of their reinforcements to eliminate half of our forces. Is such savagery common place?|[[Nas Choka]]|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
The '''Battle of Fondor''' was fought early in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet, aided by forces from the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], and covertly by the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]], fought the invaders in order to defend the planet's shipyards. The battle was infamous because while the Yuuzhan Vong fleet was destroyed, [[Centerpoint Station]]'s [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] destroyed many [[Hapes/Legends|Hapan]] ships.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|With Centerpoint's interdiction field holding them fast and a full fleet at their back, the Yuuzhan Vong will regret the day they entered this galaxy.|[[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]]|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
After the fall of [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] and [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]], [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] believed from intercepted information that the next [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attack would be either [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] or [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. The New Republic chose to fortify [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] while leaving Corellia open to attack from the Yuuzhan Vong. Despite seemingly abandoning one world for another, in reality, the Republic hoped to lure the Vong to Corellia and activate Centerpoint Station as a massive gravity well generator to trap them within the system.

In preparation for the showdown, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] traveled to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-allied [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] to enlist the [[Hapan Royal Navy]] to aid in the defense of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Meanwhile, [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]] assembled a fleet in the [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] system in preparation for a quick jump to Corellia, while the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] had strewn itself across the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] in order to protect its backdoor.

==The battle==
{{Quote|Former head of the so-called Human League, Thrackan Sal-Solo is being credited with turning the tide at the Battle of Fondor. While scores of New Republic warships were destroyed in the Yuuzhan Vong's sneak attack on Fondor's orbital construction facilities, Sal-Solo's bold use of a hyperspace repulsor beam not only drove the invaders into retreat but destroyed a significant portion of their fleet.|[[HoloNet News|Holonet News]]|<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />}}
In the interim, it was revealed that the Vong had launched their attack against neither Corellia nor Bothawui, but [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], the site of a massive New Republic shipyard complex. Prior to that, [[Kyp Durron]] led [[Kyp's Dozen|his squadron]] in an attempt to rescue slaves being held aboard the [[clustership]] [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']], which was also holding [[Wurth Skidder]]. Under siege, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chine-kal]] jumped the ship to Fondor, the intended target. Satisfied that everything was ready, [[Nas Choka]], the [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]], ordered the fleet to attack. With the routes from Bothawui to Fondor lined with [[Dovin basal]]s, the Hapans took their fleet from Commenor to Fondor. Caught completely off-guard, the only [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ships that could get there were the few ships already stationed there. Before the Hapan fleet could arrive, suicide-bombing [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] craft destroyed much of the shipyards, as well as most of the thirty capital ships docked there.

Making their way onto the ''Crèche'', Kyp and [[Ganner Rhysode]] managed to rescue most of the slaves on board, but when they found Skidder, it was obvious that he did not have long to live. Asking them to rescue [[Randa Besadii Diori|Randa]] and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[yammosk]], Skidder died. Durron and Ganner managed to rescue Randa and kill the yammosk, but the vessel began to die. The three managed to get off in time, but Chine-kal was able to inform Choka that the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] had betrayed them.

When word of the attack at Fondor reached Corellia, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Solo]] at the urging of Former Corellian dictator [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] armed Centerpoint nonetheless, while [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], who was against the idea tried to talk him out of it. Anakin planned to use the station's massive [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsors]] to literally smash the Vong fleet, but was dissuaded at the last second by his pacifist brother, Jacen. A disgusted Sal-Solo activated the controls instead.

Sal-Solo was unable to properly aim the beam, however. While the massive repulsor beam destroyed half of the Vong fleet, causing them to withdraw, it came at a large cost. Most of the Hapan fleet was destroyed and the beam grazed and destroyed a section of Fondor's penultimate moon. The beam also singed Fondor's northern hemisphere before continuing away from the planet and out into the black of space. With the yammosk dead and the unsure if there was going to be another energy beam, Choka ordered his fleet to withdraw.

==Aftermath==
Prince Isolder was blamed for the loss of the Hapan fleet upon his return to Hapes and retired from public life. The [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-feedback from so many deaths caused the pregnant Queen Mother Djo to miscarry. These incidents both helped tilt the balance of power to Isolder's mother, [[Ta'a Chume]]. Shortly after the battle, the Hapes Consortium once more closed its borders to the galaxy.

The loss of Fondor, a profitable market, caused an upheaval in [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] politics, with many of the clans opposing the ruling [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]].

With their alliance with the [[Unidentified Hutt government|Hutt Domain]] in ruins, and in an attempt to shore up his own position, Choka blockaded [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] and launched an [[Battle of Nal Hutta|attack]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], driving the Hutts from Hutt Space. Choka would spend the next two years campaigning in Hutt Space, and his victories would eventually cause [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] to [[Escalation|escalate]] him to [[Warmaster]].

Sal-Solo was elevated to the status of hero by the Corellians, and the next year was elected [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

The Fondor shipyards, although nearly destroyed, continued to service the fleets of the New Republic and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] throughout the rest of the war.

Anakin Solo ended up regretting having not fired Centerpoint Station at Thrackan's urging, believing that he could have destroyed the Yuuzhan Vong fleet without devastating the Hapans as well. As a result, Anakin grew to advocate more aggressive action in the war against the Vong, while Jacen withdrew further.
